message:
test(browser): add comprehensive SQL function test coverage

Add 42 new Playwright tests covering:
- COALESCE, NULLIF, CASE WHEN expressions
- String functions: CONCAT, SUBSTRING, TRIM, REPLACE, etc.
- Math functions: ABS, ROUND, CEIL, FLOOR, MOD, etc.
- Date/Time functions: NOW, CURRENT_DATE, DATE_PART
- NULL handling: IS NULL, IS NOT NULL
- Negative operators: NOT IN, NOT LIKE, NOT BETWEEN
- Subqueries: IN, EXISTS, NOT EXISTS, derived tables
- Set operations: UNION, UNION ALL, INTERSECT, EXCEPT
- CTEs: WITH clause
- Window functions: NTILE, PERCENT_RANK, CUME_DIST
- Window frames: ROWS BETWEEN variations
- Aggregates: STDDEV, VARIANCE, MEDIAN, STRING_AGG
- Quick wins: GREATEST, LEAST, IIF, CAST
- Join types: FULL OUTER, CROSS, compound conditions
- DELETE/UPDATE with USING clause

Total: 156 passing tests
